## Checklist

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior (required for features and bug fixes)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Code follows the project's style (TypeScript strict, no `any` where avoidable)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed (README, inline comments, etc.)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion (or justification provided below)
